creator: moiseev@mezonplus.ru
text: I've taken a look at Debian patch for the issue. IMHO it is a merely partial workaround. It requires to turn off empty backup detection $Conf{BackupZeroFilesIsFatal} for backup and turn on smbclient debug level 5 for restore. I wouldn't like to introduce such things in the port. To do it right way, I see no other option except patching Samba 4 smbclient to make it to output required information on lower debug levels.
